selector.note: Line number recorded for orientation only; the stable identity is the unique coordinate literal '(1.25,4.02)--(5.95,4.02)' within the '% Panel B' marker block. The Stealth attribute literal 'length=3.2pt,width=2.4pt' (parent line 73) is likewise unique and belongs to the same \draw. semantic_object.denotes: the left-to-right direction of increasing homocatenated-sulfur fraction across the three composition boxes (lower sulfur -> intermediate -> sulfur-rich)
semantic_object.sibling: panelB.increasing_sulfur_content_label (line 75, the centered small label the arrow annotates)

semantic_relation.direction: arrowhead at panel-x 5.95 (rightward = increasing); must be preserved
semantic_relation.must_not_imply: that the arrow line is part of, or strikes through, the label glyphs 'increasing sulfur content'

protected_invariants: arrow_endpoints: tail stays at panel-x 1.25, head (arrowhead tip) stays at panel-x 5.95, both at y=4.02
arrowhead: single Stealth head at the (5.95,4.02) end, rightward, unchanged style
label_node_increasing_sulfur_content: line 75 byte-identical (text, style, fill=white, position 3.60,4.02 unchanged)

editable_target.scope: the single Panel B arrow \draw (parent lines 73-74)
editable_target.edit_budget: split into two collinear segments on y=4.02 with a measured gap behind the label; endpoints, gap coordinates, and arrowhead placement only; no new colors/styles/leaders
editable_target.allowed_change: break the one path into a left plain segment and a right arrow-headed segment, introducing a gap that clears the rendered label bbox
editable_target.forbidden_change: the label node, the arrowhead direction/style, the tail/head extents, or any other line
